# Vcuinternational

> Multi-process manufacturing supplier based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, supporting Automotive, Defence, and Marine programmes with CNC machining, casting, sheet metal fabrication, and welding & assembly. Quality systems backed by IATF 16949 and ISO 9001:2015.

Vcuinternational operates a single facility at Huynh Van Luy Street, Quarter 7, Phu Loi Ward, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. The company positions itself as a coordinated multi-process partner for Western OEMs and Tier-1 suppliers sourcing in Southeast Asia.

## Capabilities

- [CNC Machining](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#capabilities): Precision-machined parts with dimensional verification support.
- [Casting](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#capabilities): Metal casting support for repeatable automotive and defence components.
- [Sheet Metal Fabrication](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#capabilities): Formed and fabricated parts with downstream finishing support.
- [Welding & Assembly](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#capabilities): Fabrication and assembly support for coordinated multi-stage component supply.

## Industries served

- Automotive
- Defence
- Marine

## Certifications

- IATF 16949
- ISO 9001:2015
- ISO 14001

## Lead times

- RFQ response: 24–48 hour technical review
- Project discussion: Engineering team engagement within 3 business days

## Site

- [Homepage](https://www.vcuinternational.com/): Company overview, capabilities, quality systems, programme delivery, and contact.
- [About](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#about): Multi-process manufacturing positioning.
- [Capabilities](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#capabilities): Process detail.
- [Quality](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#quality): Certifications and quality systems.
- [Contact](https://www.vcuinternational.com/#contact): Lead times and RFQ contact.

- Email: info@vcuinternational.com
